relationships: Indicates that a Person received a message from an Organization (e.g., 'jeeproject' communicated with 'Houzz Magazine').
Indicates a Person's connection to an Organization (e.g., 'Jeffrey' is associated with 'Amazon.com').
Indicates that a Person is the intended recipient of a communication or service (e.g., 'Jodi Harrison' is a recipient of 'housing-authority.org').
